title: Regulation Z; Docket No. R-1353; Truth in Lending
abstract: The Board proposes to amend Regulation Z, which implements the Truth in Lending Act (TILA) following the passage of the Higher Education Opportunity Act (HEOA). Title X of the HEOA amends TILA by adding disclosure and timing requirements that apply to creditors making private education loans, which are defined as loans made expressly for postsecondary educational expenses, but excluding open- end credit, real estate-secured loans, and loans made, insured, or guaranteed by the Federal government
action: Proposed rule; request for public comment.
issuing_agency: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
section_path: Federal Reserve System > Federal Register > Proposed Rule > E9-5561
